summary: Built and hardened a SaaS crypto trading platform, developed custom firmware for ESP32-S3 input devices, and created a Windows kernel-level input driver.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Worked on build tooling, authentication, and service account features for the SaaS trading platform.

items.title: Minimal input automation tool
items.description: Started a lightweight AutoHotKey alternative with interception support and a scenario engine.

items.title: ESP32-S3 firmware iteration
items.description: Iterated on mouse and keyboard emulation firmware, adding new device variants and performance modes.

items.title: Windows input driver development
items.description: Built a kernel-level input filter and injection driver with push-style event delivery.

items.title: Android TTS engine expansion
items.description: Expanded the Android text-to-speech engine with new voice models, pitch control, and intonation features.

items.title: Computer vision utility work
items.description: Polished a computer vision utility, improving GPU inference and input emulation modes.

items.title: Crypto platform feature push
items.description: Built out proxy infrastructure, billing model, strategy templates, and a full deployment pipeline for the trading platform.

items.title: File tagging utility polish
items.description: Polished the Windows Explorer file-tagging utility, fixing metadata encoding and release workflows.

items.title: E-reader firmware customization
items.description: Customized e-reader firmware with a map application, knowledge base, and improved book format support.

items.title: Proxy client transport update
items.description: Updated a proxy client with new transport support and API exposure.

items.title: Android LLM assistant development
items.description: Iterated on an on-device LLM assistant, building out sub-agent delegation and model management.

items.title: E-ink launcher development
items.description: Built a note-taking-centric Android launcher for E-ink devices.

items.title: Crypto prediction model research
items.description: Conducted research on crypto price prediction models, experimenting with new architectures.

items.title: Computer vision utility updates
items.description: Updated a computer vision utility with new overlay rendering and input emulation features.

items.title: File tagging utility release
items.description: Prepared the Windows Explorer file-tagging utility for release, setting up CI/CD and store publishing.

items.title: Code intelligence engine development
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: Telegram automation node maintenance
items.description: Maintained a Telegram automation node for n8n, fixing CI and session handling issues.

items.title: Development environment setup
items.description: Set up and maintained a personal Neovim development environment configuration.

items.title: Poker computer vision project
items.description: Built a computer vision pipeline for online poker, achieving high accuracy in hand and card detection.

items.title: ESP32-S3 firmware updates
items.description: Updated the ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware with new device support.

items.title: Android tasker app development
items.description: Developed an Android task management application with touch event visualization.

items.title: AI coding assistant development
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree management and git rules.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built Telegram automation tooling for content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring app
items.description: Built a mobile monitoring app for trading bots with a polished UI.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies.
